html:
Exclusive to:

The Syrup of Ipecaca is a character-specific Vegetable food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Wormwood after unlocking Poor Sap in his Skill Tree.

When fed to a vegetable-eating creature, such as a Pig, Werepig, or Beefalo, it will cause it to start panicking and dropping Manure while taking damage every 3 seconds. The effect lasts for 45 seconds, dealing a total of 75 damage (95 including base damage) and dropping 15 Manure (or 1 extra if the creature drops Manure when fed). If eaten by another player, it will have no effect other than the base stats.

Trivia

  • The Syrup of Ipecaca was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
  • The name of this item is a portmanteau of Syrup of Ipecac and the Spanish word "caca," meaning poop.
Craftable ItemsFood

–Wilson
“Eww, the smell's enough to make you sick!”

–Wormwood
“That stuff can't be good for your health.”

–Wortox
“Smell good! Like swamp and rot!”
–Wurt
“Er... thanks, but I don't think I'm hungry”
–Walter
“I'm not going to be fooled into tasting that, thank you very much!”
–Wanda
The Syrup of Ipecaca is a character-specific Vegetable food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Wormwood after unlocking Poor Sap in his Skill Tree.
When fed to a vegetable-eating creature, such as a Pig, Werepig, or Beefalo, it will cause it to start panicking and dropping Manure while taking damage every 3 seconds. The effect lasts for 45 seconds, dealing a total of 75 damage (95 including base damage) and dropping 15 Manure (or 1 extra if the creature drops Manure when fed). If eaten by another player, it will have no effect other than the base stats.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Syrup of Ipecaca was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
The name of this item is a portmanteau of Syrup of Ipecac and the Spanish word "caca," meaning poop.

The '''Syrup of Ipecaca''' is a character-specific [[Vegetable]] [[food]] [[item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted by [[Wormwood/Don't Starve Together|Wormwood]] after unlocking {{picDark|24|Poor Sap}} ''[[Wormwood/Don't Starve Together#Poor Sap|Poor Sap]]'' in his [[Insight|Skill Tree]].

When fed to a vegetable-eating creature, such as a [[Pig]], [[Werepig]], or [[Beefalo]], it will cause it to start panicking and dropping [[Manure]] while taking damage every 3 seconds. The effect lasts for 45 seconds, dealing a total of 75 damage (95 including base damage) and dropping 15 Manure (or 1 extra if the creature drops Manure when fed). If eaten by another player, it will have no effect other than the base stats.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Syrup of Ipecaca was introduced in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie|Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie]]'' update.
* The name of this item is a portmanteau of [[wikipedia:Syrup_of_ipecac|Syrup of Ipecac]] and the Spanish word "caca," meaning poop.
